Distributed under the GSAP Standard License - the full text lives at
https://gsap.com/standard-license (GSAP does not ship a LICENSE file in its
repository or npm package; each minified file carries the license header
pointing there). Following Webflow's acquisition of GreenSock, GSAP -
including its plugins - is free for both personal and commercial use.

These vendored copies are UNMODIFIED from the official npm distribution
(package gsap, version 3.12.5, dist/ files), self-hosted here solely so the
site makes no external fetches. No endorsement implied.
